mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports (reporter_id, target_type, target_id, report_type,reason) VALUES (#{reporter_id}, #{target_type}, #{target_id},#{report_type}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.name AS reporter_name, CASE WHEN r.target_type = 'PRODUCT' THEN p.name WHEN r.target_type = 'REVIEW' THEN CONCAT('후기 #', rv.review_id) WHEN r.target_type = 'QNA' THEN q.title ELSE CONCAT('대상 #', r.target_id) END AS target_title FROM reports r JOIN users u ON u.user_id = r.reporter_id LEFT JOIN products p ON p.product_id = r.target_id AND r.target_type = 'PRODUCT' LEFT JOIN reviews rv ON rv.review_id = r.target_id AND r.target_type = 'REVIEW' LEFT JOIN qnas q ON q.qna_id = r.target_id AND r.target_type = 'QNA' WHERE r.report_id = #{report_id}
